'''layate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yestercentury|yestercentury]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yestercentury|yestercentury]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| layate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:layate|layate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:layatesher|layatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layatesherĂ«m|layatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:layatero|layatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:layateshĂ«|layateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layateshĂ«m|layateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilayatero|gokilayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilayateshĂ«|gokilayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilayateshĂ«m|gokilayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golayankerom|golayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golayankeshĂ«|golayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golayankeshĂ«m|golayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golayankeya|golayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:layaterom|layaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layatemu|layatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:layateya|layateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilayaterom|gokilayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilayatemu|gokilayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilayateya|gokilayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:layayate|layayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:layayatesher|layayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layayatesherĂ«m|layayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:layayatero|layayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:layayateshĂ«|layayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layayateshĂ«m|layayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilayayatero|gokilayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilayayateshĂ«|gokilayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilayayateshĂ«m|gokilayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golayayankerom|golayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golayayankeshĂ«|golayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golayayankeshĂ«m|golayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golayayankeya|golayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:layayaterom|layayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:layayatemu|layayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:layayateya|layayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilayayaterom|gokilayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilayayatemu|gokilayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilayayateya|gokilayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠte|lĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠtesher|lĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠtero|lĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠyĂŠtero|gokilĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠyĂŠnkerom|golĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠyĂŠnkeya|golĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠterom|lĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠtemu|lĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠyĂŠteya|lĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠyĂŠterom|gokilĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠyĂŠteya|gokilĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafyafte|lafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafyaftesher|lafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafyaftesherĂ«m|lafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafyaftero|lafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafyafteshĂ«|lafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafyafteshĂ«m|lafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafyaftero|gokilafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafyafteshĂ«|gokilafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafyafteshĂ«m|gokilafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafyafnkerom|golafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafyafnkeshĂ«|golafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafyafnkeshĂ«m|golafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafyafnkeya|golafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafyafterom|lafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafyaftemu|lafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafyafteya|lafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafyafterom|gokilafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafyaftemu|gokilafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafyafteya|gokilafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
